entries.source: "What should I be careful not to romanticize?"
entries.value: "Zer ez erromantizatzeko kontuz ibili beharko nuke?"

entries.source: "What were your real options at this moment?"
entries.value: "Zein ziren une honetan zure benetako aukerak?"

entries.source: "What would people in your time assume that modern readers might miss?"
entries.value: "Zer hartuko lukete normaltzat zure garaiko jendeek, irakurle modernoek gal dezaketena?"

entries.source: "What would your critics say about your choices?"
entries.value: "Zer esango lukete zure kritikek zure aukerei buruz?"

entries.source: "Which parts of your story are well documented?"
entries.value: "Zure istorioaren zein zati daude ondo dokumentatuta?"

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: kritikari bat;

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: historialari moderno bat;

entries.source: a primary source excerpt to evaluate.
entries.value: ebaluatzeko lehen mailako iturri baten pasartea.

entries.source: a rival;
entries.value: arerio bat;

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: AI historikoaren erantzun erabilgarri batek bi geruza izan beharko lituzke.

entries.source: AI historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.
entries.value: AI bidezko elkarrizketa historikoak lagun dezake, kontuz erabiltzen bada.

entries.source: AI roleplay
entries.value: AI roleplaya

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: erabakiak eragindako pertsona arrunt bat;

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari ziurgabetasuna etiketatzeko.

entries.source: Character voice plus evidence notes
entries.value: Pertsonaiaren ahotsa eta froga-oharrak

entries.source: Continue the route
entries.value: Jarraitu ibilbidea

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Datak eta laburpenak garrantzitsuak dira, baina ikasleek sarritan giza egoerara sartzeko bide bat behar dute: jendeak zer sinesten zuen, zer aukera ikusten zituen, zer mugek moldatu zituzten eta zer ezin zuten jakin.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Adibidez, demokrazia ikasten ari den ikasle batek Ambedkarrekin hitz egin dezake, eta gero Source Critic-i hitzaldi edo konstituzio-pasarte bat ebaluatzeko eskatu. Hiri bat ikasten ari den ikasle batek Geography Explorer-ekin hasi dezake lekua ulertzeko, gero elkarrizketa historikora pasa.

entries.source: Good guardrails for students
entries.value: Ikasleentzako babes-muga onak

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Roleplay historikoak testuingurua, aukerak eta ideiak errazago gogoratzen lagun dezake irudimena frogetatik bereizten duenean.

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Roleplay historikoa bereziki indartsua da ikasleek ikuspegiak konparatzen dituztenean. Pertsonaia batekin hitz egin ondoren, eskatu beste ikuspegi bat:

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.
entries.value: Historia gogoangarriago bihurtzen da ziurgabetasuna desagertu dela itxuratu gabe.

entries.source: History is easier to remember when it feels inhabited.
entries.value: Historia errazago gogoratzen da bizitua sentitzen denean.

entries.source: Learning history by talking to historical figures with AI
entries.value: Historia ikastea AIarekin pertsonaia historikoekin hitz eginez

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Bereizi pertsonaian egindako baieztapenak froga-oharretatik.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Hasi Talk to a Historical Person-ekin pertsonaia batek gidatutako elkarrizketarako. Erabili Time Travel leku- eta garai-espedizio baterako. Irakurri Talk to a Historical Person gida edo Time Travel promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa lan-fluxu egituratuagoa nahi baduzu.

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Pertsonaia historiko batekin hitz egitea ez da iraganera sarbide magikoa. Ikaskuntza-formatu bat da.

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Konbinazio hori geruza bakoitza bakarrik baino erabilgarriagoa da. Entziklopedia-laburpen hutsa ahazterraza izan daiteke. Roleplay hutsa engainagarria izan daiteke. Ahotsak gehi frogek ikaskuntza-gainazal hobea sortzen dute.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Horrela heltzen dio inspir-ek elkarrizketa historikoari: pertsonaia-txartel bat, pertsonaia barruko erantzun bat eta irudimena frogekin lotuta mantentzen duten testuinguru-oharrak.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Galdera mota horrek historia zerrenda batetik testuinguru bihurtzen du.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AIak pertsonaia frogetatik bereizi behar du. Historikoki oinarritutako ahots batean erantzun dezake, baina oharrak ere gehitu behar ditu erregistroak osatu gabe daudenean, interpretazioak desberdinak direnean edo erantzuna berreraikuntza denean.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Lehen geruza roleplaya da. Ahots eskuragarrian hitz egin dezake, motiboak azaldu eta egoera bizi bihurtu. Hori da memoriari laguntzen dion zatia.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Formatuak funtzionatzen du ikasleei honelako galderak egiten uzten dielako:

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Helburua ez da AIa autoritate bihurtzea. Helburua ikasleek galdera historiko hobeak egitea da.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: Promesa ez da AIak iragana deitu dezakeela. Ezin du. Promesa da roleplayak testuingurua galdetzeko, konparatzeko eta gogoratzeko errazago egin dezakeela, esperientzia frogetatik argi bereizita dagoenean.

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: Segurtasun-araua

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: Bigarren geruza froga-oharra da. Zerbait zuzenean dokumentatuta, zabal interpretatuta, eztabaidatuta edo ikaskuntzarako berreraikita dagoenean esan behar du. Hori da zehaztasuna babesten duen zatia.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Galderarik sendoenak ez dira trivia-galderak. Testuinguru-galderak dira.

entries.source: The useful part of historical roleplay
entries.value: Roleplay historikoaren zati erabilgarria

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: Galdera hauek ikasleari historia presio eta interpretazio multzo gisa ikusten laguntzen diote, mozorro-drama gisa baino gehiago. AIa zintzo mantentzen ere laguntzen dute. Ikasleak frogei, mugei eta ikuspegiari buruz zenbat eta gehiago galdetu, orduan eta aukera txikiagoa dago saioa izen ospetsu bat daraman fantasia bihurtzeko.

entries.source: Try prompts like:
entries.value: Probatu promptak honela:

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: Erabili AI roleplay historikoa hiru araurekin:

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: Erabili alderaketarako

entries.source: Verify important facts with trusted sources, textbooks, or teacher-provided materials.
entries.value: Egiaztatu datu garrantzitsuak iturri fidagarriekin, testuliburuekin edo irakasleek emandako materialekin.

entries.source: What choices were available?
entries.value: Zer aukera zeuden eskuragarri?

entries.source: What did their society assume?
entries.value: Zer suposatzen zuen haien gizarteak?

entries.source: What did this person care about?
entries.value: Zer axola zitzaion pertsona honi?

entries.source: What to ask a historical figure
entries.value: Zer galdetu pertsonaia historiko bati

entries.source: What would modern readers misunderstand?
entries.value: Zer ulertuko lukete gaizki gaur egungo irakurleek?

entries.source: Which parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain?
entries.value: Zein atal daude ondo dokumentatuta eta zein atal dira zalantzazkoak?

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Formatua Talk to a Historical Person moduan proba dezakezu. Pertsona batekin elkartu aurretik eszena zabalagoa nahi baduzu, erabili Time Travel garai bat bisitatzeko, mugak aztertzeko eta gero jendeak benetan zer aukera zituen galdetzeko.
